faqs.question: What is the overall intake at Mother Teresa Nursing and Paramedical Institute itute for all courses together?

review_content.Placements: Most of the students got placed by my college. The highest salary package offered by my college was 2.5 LPA. The lowest salary offered was Rs 60,000 per month. AIMS and KGMU were the top recruiters. Most of the students got internships from my course. Roles offered were nursing officers and staff nurses.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure provided by my course were very good. Labs were very clean and workable. Library was also provided by my college that's also very knowledgeable. In library, many books related to the course. The hostel was very clean. The food available in mess and canteen was very tasty. The hostel provided sports and games.

answer.text: Some medical field which offer best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

lists: Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.
faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?

answer.text: Highest Nursing job is Senior Staff Nurse.They manage junior staff nurses and Nursing students to make sure patients get best care. These nurses are give nursing care to such patients.
